# llm-wiki AI Entrypoint Manifest

## Purpose

This file is the bounded AI-agent entrypoint for the public `llm-wiki` repository. Use it to route coding, research, and planning agents to curated wiki surfaces without scanning the full corpus first.

## Safety Boundary

Public/private boundary: this repository contains public-safe wiki pages, repo-local scripts, tests, scorecards, and governance documents. It must not contain vendor PDFs, copied standards clauses, private project documents, credentials, client data, or raw restricted archives. If a task needs restricted evidence, stop at metadata and route to the private archive owner; do not quote or reconstruct source text here.

## Start Here

- Repository overview: [README.md](README.md)
- Marine/offshore largest-domain entrypoint: [wikis/marine-engineering/llms.txt](wikis/marine-engineering/llms.txt)
- Engineering methodology entrypoint: [wikis/engineering/llms.txt](wikis/engineering/llms.txt)
- Standards metadata entrypoint: [wikis/engineering-standards/llms.txt](wikis/engineering-standards/llms.txt)
- Tier-1 repo/code/results routing: [wikis/cross-links-tier1.md](wikis/cross-links-tier1.md)
- Public/private governance: [docs/governance/service-provider-data-routing.md](docs/governance/service-provider-data-routing.md)

## Key Entry Paths

- `wikis/<domain>/CLAUDE.md` — domain schema and maintainer conventions.
- `wikis/<domain>/wiki/index.md` — catalog for a domain after choosing that domain.
- `wikis/<domain>/wiki/overview.md` — high-level synthesis for a domain.
- `wikis/<domain>/wiki/concepts/` — reusable engineering concepts.
- `wikis/<domain>/wiki/workflows/` — implementation and operating workflows.
- `wikis/<domain>/wiki/standards/` — metadata-first standards pages; never copied standards text.
- `docs/governance/` — repo safety, routing, and service-provider boundaries.
- `tests/` and `scripts/` — repo-local validators for public-safe artifacts.

## How To Find X

- Marine engineering: [wikis/marine-engineering/llms.txt](wikis/marine-engineering/llms.txt)
- Engineering methods: [wikis/engineering/llms.txt](wikis/engineering/llms.txt)
- Standards: [wikis/engineering-standards/llms.txt](wikis/engineering-standards/llms.txt)
- Governance: [docs/governance/service-provider-data-routing.md](docs/governance/service-provider-data-routing.md)
- Code and results links: [wikis/cross-links-tier1.md](wikis/cross-links-tier1.md)

## Do Not Scan Blindly

Do not start with recursive reads of `wikis/` or the large marine source-summary tree. Choose a domain manifest first, then inspect its index, overview, and only the specific concept/source pages needed for the task. For standards questions, prefer metadata pages and external public landing pages over raw documents.

## Related Surfaces

- Workspace orchestration and extraction pipelines live outside this repo; this repo is the public-safe content storehouse.
- Domain manifests intentionally point to a small number of durable entrypoints, not every source summary.
- Weekly freshness work should update manifests only when new domains, high-value concepts, or governance routes change.

## Last Updated

2026-05-15
